remaining_tasks.name: Execute 04-04 Task 1: push generated data commits
Execute 04-04 Task 2: fail closed on stale/no-fresh pipeline runs and unsafe entity paths/types
Execute 04-04 Task 3: harden snapshot retention and aggregate validation

blockers.description: Phase 04 verification has gaps_found until 04-04 is executed and verifier reruns cleanly.
blockers.workaround: Run /gsd-execute-phase 04 --gaps-only, then rerun verification through the normal execute-phase workflow.

blockers.description: Current session paused due to context exhaustion at roughly 75% usage.
blockers.workaround: Resume in a fresh session with /gsd-resume-work.

decisions.decision: Use one gap-closure plan, 04-04, instead of editing completed plans 04-01 through 04-03.
decisions.rationale: The remaining issues are tightly coupled automation safety gaps, and preserving completed plan history keeps GSD resume/execution semantics clean.

decisions.decision: Record cwd drift into an agent worktree as a blocking anti-pattern.
decisions.rationale: During Wave 2 merge/test handling, shell cwd drifted into a worktree, causing a merge command and a test command to initially target the wrong checkout.

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 04 --gaps-only from the repository root, and ensure main-workspace commands use git -C /Users/yiwei/ics/iait or npm --prefix /Users/yiwei/ics/iait.
context_notes: Phase 04 original execution completed but verifier found blockers. Gap plan 04-04 was created and checker-approved. Do not mark Phase 04 complete until 04-04 executes and verification passes.
